# Hisako Technologies Limited
# https://hisako.eu

## About
Hisako is an AI agency that designs and deploys custom AI agents, LLM integrations, and workflow automation systems for startups and businesses globally.

## Services
- Custom AI Agents Development
- AI Workflow Automation
- LLM Integration Services (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, open-source)
- AI Strategy Consulting

## Products
- VendoFlow: AI-powered retail management and point-of-sale platform

## Contact
hello@hisako.eu

- Homepage: https://hisako.eu
- FAQ: https://hisako.eu/faq
